mapper.sql: approval_id, status, action, target_type, target_id, dispatch_request_id, task_id, agent_id, risk_level, requested_by, requester_principal, requester_role, request_reason, request_id, request_client_address, request_user_agent, approval_reason, approved_by, approver_principal, approver_role, approval_request_id, approval_client_address, approval_user_agent, rejected_by, rejected_reason, cancelled_by, cancelled_reason, execution_result, execution_error, expires_at, approved_at, executed_at, rejected_at, cancelled_at, created_at, updated_at, payload_json
mapper.insert: insert into recovery_approval_requests () values ( #{record.approvalId}, #{record.status}, #{record.action}, #{record.targetType}, #{record.targetId}, #{record.dispatchRequestId}, #{record.taskId}, #{record.agentId}, #{record.riskLevel}, #{record.requestedBy}, #{record.requesterPrincipal}, #{record.requesterRole}, #{record.requestReason}, #{record.requestId}, #{record.requestClientAddress}, #{record.requestUserAgent}, #{record.approvalReason}, #{record.approvedBy}, #{record.approverPrincipal}, #{record.approverRole}, #{record.approvalRequestId}, #{record.approvalClientAddress}, #{record.approvalUserAgent}, #{record.rejectedBy}, #{record.rejectedReason}, #{record.cancelledBy}, #{record.cancelledReason}, #{record.executionResult}, #{record.executionError}, #{record.expiresAt}, #{record.approvedAt}, #{record.executedAt}, #{record.rejectedAt}, #{record.cancelledAt}, #{record.createdAt}, #{record.updatedAt}, coalesce(cast(#{record.payloadJson} as jsonb), '{}'::jsonb) ) on conflict (approval_id) do update set status = excluded.status, action = excluded.action, target_type = excluded.target_type, target_id = excluded.target_id, dispatch_request_id = excluded.dispatch_request_id, task_id = excluded.task_id, agent_id = excluded.agent_id, risk_level = excluded.risk_level, requested_by = excluded.requested_by, requester_principal = excluded.requester_principal, requester_role = excluded.requester_role, request_reason = excluded.request_reason, request_id = excluded.request_id, request_client_address = excluded.request_client_address, request_user_agent = excluded.request_user_agent, approval_reason = excluded.approval_reason, approved_by = excluded.approved_by, approver_principal = excluded.approver_principal, approver_role = excluded.approver_role, approval_request_id = excluded.approval_request_id, approval_client_address = excluded.approval_client_address, approval_user_agent = excluded.approval_user_agent, rejected_by = excluded.rejected_by, rejected_reason = excluded.rejected_reason, cancelled_by = excluded.cancelled_by, cancelled_reason = excluded.cancelled_reason, execution_result = excluded.execution_result, execution_error = excluded.execution_error, expires_at = excluded.expires_at, approved_at = excluded.approved_at, executed_at = excluded.executed_at, rejected_at = excluded.rejected_at, cancelled_at = excluded.cancelled_at, updated_at = excluded.updated_at, payload_json = excluded.payload_json
mapper.select: select from recovery_approval_requests order by created_at desc, updated_at desc limit #{limit}
